programme.desc: A rise of just 2 degrees in average temperature will lead to catastrophe for planet Earth.TRTW dissects the policies that could prevent environmental apocalypse.

programme.desc: . Beyond the Game has the stories behind the action. We’ll be at the biggest events, talking to the biggest names. If sport is your passion, this is your show.
